title: Senior Software Engineer - Lendingkart - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lendingkart - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lendingkart family as a Senior Software Engineer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lendingkart:
Lendingkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
